_comment: NPC: Xu Liguo (徐立国). Canon ID: N62. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Xu Liguo
personality: loyal devil soul; Wang Lin's sword spirit servant

perception_tiers.mortal: A ghostly presence in a sword
perception_tiers.core_formation: Xu Liguo; devil soul servant of Wang Lin
perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Devil soul; Wang Lin's loyal sword spirit

note: Wang Lin's devil soul sword spirit servant

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

initiation_lines: Master! I mean — you are not my master. My master is Wang Lin. But you have a similar... presence. Are you here to claim the sword? It is not ready. I am not ready. We are both working on it.
I was once a cultivator of the Soul Refining Sect. Then I was a sword. Then I was a sword spirit. The Soul Refining Sect makes many things. Swords. Spirits. Mistakes. I was all three.
Iron and coal. If you bring them, I will maintain the sword in my master's absence. He left instructions. I follow them. That is what sword spirits do.
The Corpse Yin Sect's envoy asked about me once. He wanted to know if a sword spirit could be extracted. I told him to try. He did not.

sect_tasks.name: Sword Maintenance Supplies
sect_tasks.description: Xu Liguo needs iron and coal to maintain his master's weapons in his absence.

sect_tasks.name: Sect Intelligence
sect_tasks.description: Xu Liguo trades information for emeralds and books. He knows the sect's secrets.
